creator: beech@mangohealth.org
text:
On Saturday 19 August 2006 16:00, Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of ftp/bftpd,
>
> Please note that PR ports/102298 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/102298

I agree to the patch, also I am the maintainer. Please note the email address 
change.

Thanks,  Beech
